parents.subject: LU-9636 ofd: Add kernel doc style for OFD (4)

commit.subject: LU-16796 obd: Change struct md_open_data to use kref
commit.message:
LU-16796 obd: Change struct md_open_data to use kref

This patch changes struct md_open_data to use
kref instead of atomic_t

This patch also removes unused macros obd_mod_get
and obd_mod_put

Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Arshad Hussain <arshad.hussain@aeoncomputing.com>
Change-Id: I68291ff4e9d98051e683891075ce539690fdea72
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/56453
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
